text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having lost to Mr. C.B. last time, Eishin Flash
cannot hide her anxiety upon meeting her again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, I tell her how setbacks are a valuable
experience that benefit her in the long run. She
puts her faith in my words and heads to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she loses the race, Mr. C.B.
acknowledges her abilities and confirms that she
has improved.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her schedule through to completion has
borne fruit. Eishin Flash regains confidence in her
current abilities and sets her determined gaze
upon the Osaka Hai.
